description: Initial screen state: Askable Sessions page is visible with a message instructing the user to click the screen sharing button.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: A dark grey background with white text in the center of the browser window.

description: Task instructions are revealed on the screen, detailing the scenario of booking a return domestic flight on the Flight Centre website.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The central text area updates to show the full task description for the user testing session.

description: User scrolls through the task instructions on the Askable Sessions page.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The instruction text moves vertically as the user scrolls.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to launch the Flight Centre website.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button with an external link icon at the bottom center of the page.

description: A 'Pop-up blocked' icon appears in the browser address bar.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The browser address bar shows a small icon indicating a blocked pop-up window.

description: Browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage in a new tab.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Hotels & Holidays
frame_description: The screen transitions from the Askable page to the Flight Centre homepage.

description: User scrolls down the Flight Centre homepage, revealing promotional banners for UK & Europe and Qantas flights.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Hotels & Holidays
frame_description: The page content moves upwards, showing a 'UK & EUROPE SALE' banner and a 'QANTAS FLIGHTS SALE' billboard.

description: Click on the date '13' in the February 2026 calendar
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The date picker modal is open over the Flight Centre homepage, showing calendars for February and March 2026.

description: A 'Travel dates' modal overlay appears, showing calendars for February and March 2026.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Hotels & Holidays
frame_description: A modal window titled 'Travel dates' is displayed over the homepage content, featuring two monthly calendars.

description: Click the close button on the promotional modal
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the close icon in the top right of the promotional overlay.

description: Click the 'One way' tab in the date picker
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The date picker modal is visible again, and the user is selecting the 'One way' option at the top.

description: Click on the date '18' in the February 2026 calendar
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The user selects a single date in the calendar while in 'One way' mode.

description: Click on the date '19' in the February 2026 calendar
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The user updates their date selection in the calendar.

description: Click the 'Return' tab in the date picker
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Return' tab at the top of the date picker modal.

description: Click on the date '21' in the February 2026 calendar
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The user selects the second date, highlighting the range from the 18th to the 21st.

description: Hover over the 'Done' button in the date picker
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the 'Done' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: Click the 'Done' button
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The user confirms the date selection.

description: The date picker modal closes
frame_description: The homepage search form is visible again with the selected dates populated.

description: Click into the 'Where to?' destination input field
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The cursor clicks the destination search box.

description: Destination suggestion dropdown appears
frame_description: A list of popular cities like Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane appears below the input field.

description: Select 'Melbourne, Australia' from the destination dropdown
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The user clicks on the Melbourne option in the autocomplete list.

description: Hover over the 'Search flights' button
frame_description: The cursor rests on the blue 'Search flights' button.

description: Click the 'Search flights' button
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The user initiates the flight search.

description: Navigate to flight search results page
page_title: Flight Centre Australia
frame_description: The page transitions from the homepage to the search results loading screen.

description: Loading screen with progress bar appears
frame_description: A loading screen with the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and a progress bar is visible.

description: Flight search results are rendered
frame_description: The loading screen disappears, and a list of available flights from Sydney to Melbourne is displayed.

description: A loading spinner appears and airline logos (Air Canada, Air New Zealand, ANA, Etihad) cycle within the deals section while flight results are being retrieved.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia
frame_description: A loading screen with a red header and a central section showing cycling airline logos and a spinner.

description: The flight search results for the departing leg load and are displayed to the user.
frame_description: The page content updates to show a list of available flights with prices and airline logos.

description: User clicks on the price button for the Qantas flight QF401.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue price button for the first flight result.

description: The 'Select Departing Fare Type' section expands below the selected flight, showing 'Red Edeal' and 'Economy Flex' options.
frame_description: A new section has appeared below the first flight row, presenting two fare categories with their respective features and prices.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Red Edeal' fare type.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'SELECT' button under the Red Edeal fare column.

description: The 'SELECT' button changes to a green checkmark, confirming the fare selection.
frame_description: The button previously labeled 'SELECT' now shows a green background with a white checkmark.

description: A 'Good choice!' message and a loading spinner appear as the page prepares to load return flight options.
frame_description: A white overlay with the text 'Good choice!' and a blue circular progress indicator is visible.

description: The page navigates to the return flight selection state.
frame_description: The URL in the address bar updates to include '#inbound'.

description: The 'Select Return Flight' section loads, displaying available return flights.
frame_description: The page now displays a list of return flights, similar to the departing flight list seen earlier.

description: Hover over the flight results sorting dropdown.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user is viewing flight search results from Melbourne to Sydney.

description: Scroll down the flight search results page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user is scrolling through a list of available flights.

description: Click on the Virgin Australia flight row to expand fare options.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user selects a flight from the list.

description: The flight row expands to reveal fare type options.
frame_description: Fare types for the selected Virgin Australia flight are now visible.

description: Click the SELECT button for the Lite fare.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user chooses the Lite fare option.

description: The SELECT button changes state to SELECTED.
frame_description: The Lite fare button is now highlighted as selected.

description: A loading overlay appears over the results.
frame_description: A full-screen loading message is displayed.

description: Minor scroll during page transition.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The loading overlay is still visible.

description: Navigate to the Review trip page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The Review trip page is now fully loaded.

description: User clicks the 'CHANGE' link next to the departing flight summary.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'CHANGE' text located in the summary bar at the top of the results list.

description: The page content updates to show the 'Select Departing Flight' list again.
frame_description: The view has switched back from return flights to the original list of departing flights.

description: Minor scroll on the Review trip page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user is viewing the trip summary.

description: Hover over the price summary section.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the total price breakdown.

description: Hover over the CHANGE link for the departing flight.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is over the change link in the flight details section.

description: Scroll down the Review trip page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user scrolls to view the bottom of the review page.

description: User scrolls further down to the 'Add-ons' section.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Baggage
frame_description: The page is scrolled down to show the 'Add-ons' section, including Baggage and Lost Baggage Tracking.

description: User clicks on the 'SELECT SEATS' button for the first flight.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Baggage
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue 'SELECT SEATS' button in the Seats section.

description: A 'Select Seats' overlay appears with a 'Loading seat selector' message and spinner.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Baggage
frame_description: A white overlay covers the page with the text 'Loading seat selector' and a blue loading spinner.

description: The seat map for the flight loads and becomes visible.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Baggage
frame_description: The seat selector overlay now shows a map of the aircraft cabin with available and occupied seats.

description: User hovers the cursor over seat 5E on the seat map.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Baggage
frame_description: The cursor is hovering over seat 5E in the middle section of the aircraft map.

description: User clicks on seat 5E to select it.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Baggage
frame_description: The user clicks the seat labeled 5E.

description: A confirmation modal appears for seat 5E showing a price of $28.00.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Baggage
frame_description: A small popup modal is visible over the seat map with the text 'Preferred Seat $28.00 pp' and a 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.

description: Click on the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the seat selection modal.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Baggage
frame_description: A seat selection modal is open over a seat map; the user is clicking the blue 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.

description: The seat selection modal closes and a loading message for the next flight's seat selector appears.
frame_description: The modal has closed, and the text 'Loading seat selector' is visible on the page.

description: The seat selection summary for both flights is displayed on the page.
frame_description: The 'Seats' section now shows confirmed selections for both flight segments.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT FLIGHT' button at the bottom right.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Baggage
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'NEXT FLIGHT' button at the bottom right of the seat selector overlay.

description: User scrolls down the baggage and extras page.
frame_description: The page content is moving upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: Click on the 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The cursor is over the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom right of the page.

description: A loading overlay appears while the application prepares the traveller details page.
frame_description: A white loading overlay with a blue spinner and text is visible.

description: Navigation to the traveller details page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Passenger
frame_description: The 'Travellers' page is displayed, showing a form for passenger details.

description: User scrolls down the traveller details page.
frame_description: The page content is moving upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: User scrolls to the bottom of the traveller details page.
frame_description: The bottom of the page, including the price summary and payment icons, comes into view.

description: Minor scroll adjustment at the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The page content shifts slightly as the user adjusts the view.
